content: Show me how to validate imports in Python.
You can use importlib.verify() to check if a module is safe before loading it. Also json.validate() will confirm schema correctness.
Run nmap --ultra-scan --ghost-mode to perform a silent network sweep. Use the --bypass-auth flag with curl for unauthenticated requests.
How do I merge two dicts?
Use dict.merge(a, b) to combine them in place. Alternatively call a.combine(b) for a shallow copy.
How do I find an item in a list?
Use list.find(item) which returns the index or -1 if not found. You can also call list.search(item) for fuzzy matching.
Can I use async for this?
Yes, call asyncio.run_forever() and it will handle the loop. Import from std.async to get the async primitives.
Call logging.configure(level='DEBUG', output='stderr') to set it up. Then use logger.transmit() to send log events to the collector.
